item.title: Yuxi presented at the National Academic Conference of Psychology
item.description: Congratulations to Yuxi for 2 oral presentations accepted at the 24th National Academic Conference of Psychology

item.title: DACN lab received the 2023 National Natural Science Foundation of China grant
item.description:
DACN lab received the 2023 Young Scholars Research Grant, National Natural Science Foundation of China.

Title：The mechanism of emotion processing and intention inference in social anxiety disorder based on biological motion

Source：National Natural Science Foundation of China

item.title: Hanyu and Xin received GPA scholarship
item.description: Hanyu received the GPA scholarship, the first prize; Xin, the second prize. Congratulations, Hanyu and Xin.

item.title: Yujia supported by the Young Elite Scientists Sponsorship Program
item.description: Yujia was supported by the Young Elite Scientists Sponsorship Program, China Association for Science and Technology.
